title: Pseudo file state generator with overlay warnings
purpose: Generates v6 file state objects with method details and overlay warnings from a pseudo-database.

steps.content: Initialize the pseudo-database handle for the given project.
Query the database for the file row matching the provided file path.
IF no file row is found, return null.
Query the database for all method rows associated with the file path.
Prepare a statement to fetch steps for each method.
Map each method row to a method state object including its steps.
Extract method IDs from the method rows.
Query the database for overlay warnings associated with the method IDs.
Construct and return the complete file state object with methods and warnings.
